LanguageData.Ambrosia.description: A rare, mutated fruit found in the wasteland. Punga fruit is prized for its unique taste and the mild, uplifting high it provides. Consuming too much can lead to a subtle addiction, but survivors swear by its mood-boosting effects.
LanguageData.Ambrosia.label: punga fruit
LanguageData.Arktos_CocoonFireAnt.description: A stasis cocoon containing a fire ant.
LanguageData.Arktos_CocoonFireAnt.label: fire ant cocoon
LanguageData.Arktos_CocoonFireSoldierAnt.description: A stasis cocoon containing a fire soldier ant.
LanguageData.Arktos_CocoonFireSoldierAnt.label: fire soldier ant cocoon
LanguageData.Arktos_CocoonFireWorkerAnt.description: A stasis cocoon containing a fire worker ant.
LanguageData.Arktos_CocoonFireWorkerAnt.label: fire worker ant cocoon
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAnt.description: A fire ant adapted for underground life. Its digging claws and hive coordination make it a formidable tunnel dweller.
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAnt.label: fire ant
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAnt.tools.0.label: head claw
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAnt.tools.1.label: head
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntDrone.description: A winged fire ant bred for mating flights and scouting. On its own it is fragile, but swarms of drones are still dangerous.
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntDrone.label: fire ant drone
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntDrone.tools.0.label: mandibles
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntDrone.tools.1.label: head
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntHive.description: A hive of giant fire ants. If activated, it will spawn additional fire ants and hives over time, as well as valuable insect jelly.
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntHive.label: fire ant hive
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntLarva.description: The juvenile stage of a fire ant. Fire ant larvae are nurtured by workers and mature into the hive's next caste.
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntLarva.label: fire ant larva
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntLarva.tools.0.label: mandibles
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntLarva.tools.1.label: head
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntQueen.comps.1.label: Fire ant queen
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntQueen.description: The queen of a fire ant megahive. She anchors the colony, lays the next generation, and turns any nest she survives in into a larger threat.
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntQueen.label: fire ant queen
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntQueen.tools.0.label: head claw
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntQueen.tools.1.label: head
LanguageData.Arktos_FireSoldierAnt.description: The most aggressive of the fire ants. These creatures defend their hive with relentless ferocity, thick chitin, and powerful jaws.
LanguageData.Arktos_FireSoldierAnt.label: fire soldier ant
LanguageData.Arktos_FireSoldierAnt.tools.0.label: head claw
LanguageData.Arktos_FireSoldierAnt.tools.1.label: head
LanguageData.Arktos_FireWorkerAnt.description: A massive fire ant engineered for strength and resilience. Fire worker ants are fiercely territorial and maintain their hive with absolute loyalty.
LanguageData.Arktos_FireWorkerAnt.label: fire worker ant
LanguageData.Arktos_FireWorkerAnt.tools.0.label: mandibles
LanguageData.Arktos_FireWorkerAnt.tools.1.label: head
LanguageData.HiveQueen.description: The queen of a giant ant hive. She is responsible for laying eggs and directing the colony's growth and defense.
LanguageData.HiveQueen.label: giant ant queen
LanguageData.Larva.description: The juvenile stage of a giant ant. Ant larvae are cared for by worker ants and will eventually grow into powerful hive members.
LanguageData.Locust.description: A giant ant capable of flight. Ant drones only live to mate with the queen.
LanguageData.Locust.label: giant ant drone
LanguageData.Megascarab.description: A massive ant engineered for strength and resilience. Giant ants are known for their powerful mandibles and hive loyalty.
LanguageData.Megascarab.label: giant worker ant
LanguageData.Megaspider.description: The most aggressive of the giant ants. These creatures defend their hive with relentless ferocity and powerful jaws.
LanguageData.Megaspider.label: giant soldier ant
LanguageData.Plant_TreeDrago.description: A hardy desert yucca with twisted limbs and dagger leaves. In the old Mojave, these trees marked roads, water, and trouble from miles away.
LanguageData.Plant_TreeDrago.label: joshua tree
LanguageData.Plant_TreeSnagroot.description: A blackened, near dead tree which survived a nearby atomic blast. When harvested, it yields a meager amount of wood.
LanguageData.Plant_TreeSnagroot.label: charred tree
LanguageData.Spelopede.description: A giant ant adapted for underground life. Its tough exoskeleton and digging ability make it a formidable tunnel dweller.
LanguageData.Spelopede.label: giant ant
